metadata.title: Old Folks Home | St Mark's Cozy Home
metadata.description: St Mark's Cozy Home is a Home for old folks home for elders or senior citizens. The Home seeks to provide a Christian environment of love and care to the elderly.

##### St Mark's Cozy Home  
Welcomes You

Life Worth Living

###### Isaiah 46:4  
New International Version

Even to your old age and grey hairs, I am he, I am he who will sustain you. I have made you and I will carry you; I will sustain you and I will rescue.

## St Mark's Cozy Home at a Glance

Life Worth Living

St Mark's Cozy Home seeks to provide an environment of love and care to the elderly, ministering to their physical and spiritual needs. It has adequate facilities which includes recreation room, pharmacy, sick bay, outdoor space, provides supervised care with 24-hour residential staff around.

[Learn More](https://www.stmarkscozyhome.com/about)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/ea643c_c195064b04ae4ce9a7c9cc06bdcd8fb7~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_431,y_35,w_641,h_734/fill/w_449,h_466,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ea643c_c195064b04ae4ce9a7c9cc06bdcd8fb7~mv2.jpeg)

## Announcement

01

## VISITATION

Visitation : Families of loved ones can visit at the following time: 

9.30AM - 10.30AM

3.00PM - 4.00PM

Kindly note: 

\- Maximum of 3 people per visit

\- compulsory to wear face mask 

\- RTK testing is mandatory

02

## DONATION

Donors are welcomed especially during these dire times. Please call to make an appointment 

03

[How you can help?](https://www.stmarkscozyhome.com/how-to-donate)
